channel.title: Proxy on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Proxy on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Self-Hosted Web Proxy Guide: Squid vs Tinyproxy vs Caddy 2026
item.description: When you browse the web, every request leaves your device and travels through your ISP’s infrastructure before reaching its destination. Your internet service provider can see every domain you visit, log your browsing habits, and in many regions, sell that data to third parties. A self-hosted web proxy puts you back in control of your network traffic — encrypting, filtering, and caching your requests on your own terms.
